name: deep-research-pro
tagline: ClawHub (87★): Multi-source deep research agent. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports. No API keys required.
verdict: Hygiene is clean, but the skill never defines where 'short' topics end and 'long' ones begin, even though that threshold decides whether the user gets a full report or just a summary with an offered file - an ambiguous fork with materially different outputs. It also lacks scope-exclusion language and clear trigger phrasing.

highlights.summary: No threshold defines 'short' vs 'long' topics, yet the two branches produce materially different deliverables (full report vs. summary + offered file).
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language appears anywhere in the description or body.
Description states what the skill does but never states when/on what phrasing to trigger it.
